gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Display deterministic Ardyn status and control-surface metadata as review-only text.
blockerNotes: Requires a later explicit command/control authorization phase before any interactive Locus control surface can call Ardyn.
Current Phase 5.46 output is documentary metadata only.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Expose static process/tool capability labels for review without tool execution.
blockerNotes: Requires separate process-control and tool-execution authorization phases.
No process supervision or stdio runtime writer is introduced.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: List deterministic Ardyn review artifacts and provenance metadata for Locus-visible review.
blockerNotes: Requires future review routing and evaluator authorization phases before artifacts can drive assignment or decisions.
Current artifacts remain non-authoritative.

gapEntries.sourceReadinessMatrixTouchpoint: future Secure Drop compose/inbox consumer surface
gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Reference future content-fabric Secure Drop compose and inbox contracts by name only.
blockerNotes: Requires a later explicit content-fabric Secure Drop authorization phase.
Ardyn does not consume Secure Drop in Phase 5.46.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Document that Locus command/control runtime remains unavailable.
blockerNotes: Requires explicit runtime enablement and command exposure authorization.
serve-runtime remains blocked, including dry-run.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Record static world/project orchestration metadata for future wrapper planning.
blockerNotes: Requires future Multiverse orchestration authorization before live registry or project writes.
Phase 5.46 does not connect to Multiverse.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Expose AI capability labels and requirements for review-only planning.
blockerNotes: Requires explicit evaluator and model-runtime authorization phases.
Current metadata cannot trigger AI execution.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Describe task and capability wrapper metadata without invoking tasks or MCP tools.
blockerNotes: Requires future task runtime and MCP authorization phases.
No MCP tool is exposed by Ardyn in Phase 5.46.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Record citizen/adapter candidates as review-only metadata for future consideration.
blockerNotes: Requires explicit connector and adapter runtime authorization phases.
Candidate metadata is non-authorizing and cannot grant connector access.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Record Fabric coordination references as metadata only.
blockerNotes: Requires separate Fabric and content-fabric runtime authorization phases.
Secure Drop remains a future content-fabric capability reference only.

gapEntries.allowedCurrentBehavior: Document that registry, websocket, MCP, and task runtime paths remain unavailable.
blockerNotes: Requires explicit registry, websocket, MCP, and task runtime authorization phases.
Fallow remains advisory only and Fallow Runtime is not used.

futureAuthorizationCandidateBuckets: future Secure Drop compose/inbox consumer contract
